biography: Rasmus, a familiar name at Vihti Golf Club, is known for his meticulous approach to the game. While some might see him as reserved, those who know him well understand that his quiet demeanor masks a fierce competitive spirit and a sharp mind for strategy on the course.

Rasmus has graced the Hector Trophée with his presence on one occasion in the past. While the coveted Hector Trophée and the Victor Trophy have eluded him thus far, his dedication and precision continue to be hallmarks of his game.

Although Rasmus is considered retired from the Hector Trophée events, his presence is missed by fans. Golf enthusiasts can only hope that the greens will once again welcome Rasmus's talents in future tournaments.
